name: Fox Ridge Public Golf Course
about: Fox Ridge Public Golf Course is a premier 18-hole championship golf facility located in Dike, IA, 10 minutes west of Cedar Falls. The course was constructed in two phases, with the front nine and clubhouse built in 1998, and the back nine opening in 2001. Playing over 6,800 yards from the longest tees with a 72.6 rating and 124 slope, Fox Ridge offers four sets of tees to accommodate all skill levels. The venue features a full-service restaurant, event spaces for weddings and corporate outings, and a TrackMan golf simulator for year-round play and practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan simulator technology for realistic indoor golf experience
Family-friendly championship course with multiple tee boxes for all skill levels
Full-service dining options and event facilities for groups and special occasions
Multiple membership packages including simulator access for passholders

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant (Greenside Grille) available with daily hours starting at 7:00 AM
Restaurant and bar services available; 'NEW LOUNGE COMING SOON' indicates beverage service

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with ball and club tracking capabilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players must bring their own golf equipment for simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks may not be allowed, but the on-site restaurant (Greenside Grille) provides dining options with bar services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole simulator sessions typically take 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Fox Ridge is family-friendly with a championship course designed for all skill levels and events suitable for families.
